revision.text:
<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:12 nguŏk 23 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[hak:12-ngie̍t 23-ngit (nùng-la̍k)]][[ja:12月23日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 12월 23일]][[zh-min-nan:12 goe̍h 23 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:十二月廿三]][[zh:十二月廿三]]
{{Not to be confused with|December 23|qq=December 23}}<!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?-->
{{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=十二月廿三|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 12월 23일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar December|qq=}} '''December 23''' is the 23rd day of the month {{ill|Layue|en|Layue|qid=Q905470|lt=December (Shiwasu)|1=Layue}}, the 12th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}. Its {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Butsumetsu|ja|仏滅|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Butsumetsu|1=Butsumetsu|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q10886789}}. == Events == * {{ill|Ansei|en|Ansei|qid=Q1327259|lt=Ansei|1=Ansei}} 2nd year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|qid=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1856|en|1856|qid=Q7676|lt=1856|1=1856}} {{ill|January 30|en|January 30|qid=Q2287|lt=January 30|1=January 30}}) – The {{ill|Nichiran-Wa Shin-joyaku|ja|日蘭和親条約|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Nichiran-Wa Shin-joyaku|1=Nichiran-Wa Shin-joyaku|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11510439}} was signed, formally establishing diplomatic relations between Japan and {{ill|Netherlands|en|Netherlands|qid=Q55|lt=the Netherlands|1=Netherlands}}. == Births == * {{ill|Mongol invasions of Japan|en|Mongol invasions of Japan|qid=Q208156|lt=Genkō|1=Mongol invasions of Japan}} 1st year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|qid=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1322|en|1322|qid=Q5770|lt=1322|1=1322}} {{ill|January 11|en|January 11|qid=Q2247|lt=January 11|1=January 11}}) – {{ill|Emperor Kōmyō|en|Emperor Kōmyō|qid=Q555520|lt=Kōmyō Tennō|1=Emperor Kōmyō}}, the 2nd Emperor of the {{ill|Northern Court|en|Northern Court|qid=Q1201819|lt=Northern Court|1=Northern Court}} (died {{ill|1380|en|1380|qid=Q6327|lt=1380|1=1380}}). * {{ill|Meiō|en|Meiō|qid=Q1193841|lt=Meio|1=Meiō}} 5th year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|qid=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1497|en|1497|qid=Q6702|lt=1497|1=1497}} {{ill|January 26|en|January 26|qid=Q2282|lt=January 26|1=January 26}}) – {{ill|Emperor Go-Nara|en|Emperor Go-Nara|qid=Q349467|lt=Go-Nara Tennō|1=Emperor Go-Nara}}, the 105th Emperor of Japan (died {{ill|1557|en|1557|qid=Q6595|lt=1557|1=1557}}). * {{ill|Meiji era|en|Meiji era|qid=Q3125096|lt=Meiji era|1=Meiji era}} 4th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|qid=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1872|en|1872|qid=Q7753|lt=1872|1=1872}} {{ill|February 1|en|February 1|qid=Q2312|lt=February 1|1=February 1}}) – {{ill|Shūsei Tokuda|en|Shūsei Tokuda|qid=Q2439027|lt=Tokuda Akusei|1=Shūsei Tokuda}}, a novelist (died {{ill|1943|en|1943|qid=Q18623|lt=1943|1=1943}}). == Deaths == * {{ill|Ten'ō|ja|天応 (日本)|1=Ten'ō|2=ja|3=天応 (日本)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q1373125}}{{citation needed|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ten'ō|qq=}} 1st year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|qid=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|782|en|782|qid=Q30550|lt=782|1=782}} {{ill|January 11|en|January 11|qid=Q2247|lt=January 11|1=January 11}}) – {{ill|Emperor Kōnin|en|Emperor Kōnin|qid=Q958662|lt=Kōnin Tennō|1=Emperor Kōnin}}, the 49th Emperor of Japan (born {{ill|709|en|709|qid=Q23514|lt=709|1=709}}). == Commemorations ==
== Fictional Events == === Deaths === * {{ill|Enpō|en|Enpō|qid=Q1145735|lt=Enpō|1=Enpō}} 2nd year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|qid=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1675|en|1675|qid=Q7624|lt=1675|1=1675}} {{ill|January 18|en|January 18|qid=Q2265|lt=January 18|1=January 18}}) – {{ill|Isshin Tasuke|en|Isshin Tasuke|qid=Q3155712|lt=Isshin Taisuke|1=Isshin Tasuke}}, a fishmonger.
== See Also == {{Lunar Calendar See Also|12|22|12|24|11|23|1|12|1223|qq=}} ==Notes== <references group="lower-alpha"/> ==References== {{reflist|qq=}} {{Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}
[[zh-min-nan:12 goe̍h 23 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:十二月廿三]]
{{translated page|ja|12月23日 (旧暦)|version=83353972|comment=Imported full ja history}}
[[cdo:12 nguŏk 23 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[de:December 23 (Lunisolar)]]
[[ko:음력 12월 23일]] [[ja:12月23日 (旧暦)]] [[zh:十二月廿三]]
[[ar:December 23 (Lunisolar)]]
